name: education_mutual_aid_request_conflicts_oakline_car_fair
premise: A gifted program lottery algorithm is being questioned after a neighborhood received zero seats two years running. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education mutual aid request conflicts oakline car fair has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make care feel morally loud today, while fairness is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Talia Santos
agents.identity: I am Talia Santos, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ansel Morales
agents.identity: I am Ansel Morales, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so fairness does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so care does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Talia Santos must choose under care versus fairness. What does Talia Santos do?
